page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Phexpo a package for bidirectional enrichment analysis of phenotypes and chemicals.

Phexpo is an R package for enrichment analysis of phenotypes (from the Human Phenotype Ontology(Köhler et al., 2019)) and chemicals.
